title: Item Collection
description: Item Collection” is a Minecraft datapack where players must collect every item in the game to unlock special rewards. Explore, craft, and trade to complete your collection!
body:
Item Collection is a Minecraft datapack that challenges players to collect every item in the game to unlock unique and special rewards. With over a thousand achievements to unlock, it offers a deep and engaging experience that encourages exploration, crafting, trading, and battling. Complete your collection and discover all the secrets and bonuses hidden within the game!

This is a very large project, and while I’ve done my best to ensure everything works smoothly, there may still be some errors or issues. If you encounter any problems or bugs, please don’t hesitate to send me a message. Your feedback is greatly appreciated!

I hope you enjoy it, and have fun playing!
